info.name: School Management API
info.description: APIs for managing school data - Add schools and list by proximity

request.description: Add a new school to the database

response.name: Add School - Success
Add School - Validation Error

request.description: Fetch all schools sorted by distance from user's location

response.name: List Schools - Success
